root_cause: Agent failed to attempt the cancel_pending_order tool call and unnecessarily escalated to human agents when the system likely had the capability to cancel the order.
explanation: The agent properly authenticated the user and attempted to get order details, but when get_order_details failed to find the order, it immediately gave up and transferred to human agents. The agent should have attempted the cancel_pending_order tool with the provided order ID #W7602708, as the ground truth shows this would have been successful. This represents a failure to complete the core task and an unnecessary escalation.
